characters.appearance: Young adult male, athletic build, olive complexion. Dark, wavy, medium-length hair. Dark eyes and light facial hair.
characters.wardrobe: Initially wears a white t-shirt. Later wears an olive green long-sleeve waffle-knit shirt and blue jeans. Sunglasses rest on his head throughout.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Short blonde bob haircut. Blue eyes and symmetrical features.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English में हमेशा "I'm fine" या "I don't know" बोलना बंद करो। [Stop always saying "I'm fine" or "I don't know" in English.]
Character A says: ये बहुत basic लगता है। [It sounds very basic.]
Character A says: मैं भी पहले ऐसे ही अटकता था। [I used to get stuck like this too.]
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की। [Then I started practicing with Supernova.]
Character A says: Let me show you. [Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out common, repetitive English phrases.
- Establishes empathy by admitting the speaker used to struggle too.
- Introduces the app as the solution and transitions into a demo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Hi! Tell me about yourself. [Hi! Tell me about yourself.]
Character A says: I am work in office. [I am work in office.]
Character B says: Almost! Better say: "I work in an office." [Almost! Better say: "I work in an office."]
Character A says: Oh, grammar में हमेशा confusion होती है। [Oh, there's always confusion in grammar.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं! मैं आपकी AI tutor हूँ, आपकी मदद करने के लिए। [No worries! I am your AI tutor, here to help you.]
Character A says: पर private tutor तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं। [But private tutors are very expensive.]
Character B says: Supernova बहुत affordable है। यहाँ आप बिना डरे रोज़ English बोलने की practice कर सकते हैं। [Supernova is very affordable. Here you can practice speaking English daily without fear.]
Character A says: सच में? Real conversations? [Really? Real conversations?]
Character B says: हाँ! Interview हो या office, मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करूँगी। [Yes! Whether it's an interview or office, I will correct your grammar and pronunciation.]
Character A says: Perfect! मैं आज ही Supernova download करता हूँ। [Perfect! I will download Supernova today.]
Character B says: Great! Let's speak English together. [Great! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core AI tutor feature with a relatable, real-world mistake (workplace context).
- Addresses the cost objection directly, positioning the app as an affordable alternative to private tutors.
- Highlights key benefits: judgment-free practice, grammar/pronunciation correction, and confidence building.
